mappings.expected_element: Clear intended use and reportable result
mappings.gap_if_missing: Intended use is unclear or broader than supported data
mappings.reviewer_question: Please clarify the intended use and reportable result.
Please provide the rationale for the selected validation scope.

mappings.expected_element: Included and excluded characteristics are justified
mappings.gap_if_missing: Expected validation characteristic is missing or excluded without rationale
mappings.reviewer_question: Please explain why the characteristic is not included or not applicable.

mappings.expected_element: Criteria are linked to purpose, method type, and data source
mappings.gap_if_missing: Acceptance criteria lack rationale or source
mappings.reviewer_question: Please provide the basis for each acceptance criterion.

mappings.gap_if_missing: SST is generic or not linked to method performance
mappings.reviewer_question: Please explain how each SST monitors critical method performance.

mappings.expected_element: Invalid run, repeat, retest, and exclusion rules are defined
mappings.gap_if_missing: Failed-run or repeat rule is unclear
mappings.reviewer_question: Please provide predefined deviation and repeat testing rules.

mappings.expected_element: Reference standard role and qualification are described
mappings.reviewer_question: Please clarify reference standard qualification, storage, handling, and intended role.

mappings.expected_element: Matrix suitability or interference assessment is addressed
mappings.reviewer_question: Please provide matrix effect or suitability assessment for the intended matrix.

mappings.expected_element: Draft-only and human review requirement are clear
mappings.gap_if_missing: Output appears to imply approval or final use
mappings.reviewer_question: Please confirm the output remains draft-only and requires qualified review.
